_note: Cascade retrofit of lighting-layout/examples/uk-multi-entrance-classroom. 16 LED_PANEL_600 (4500 lm each) in 4×4 grid for a 10×8 m classroom; 3 entrance switches. All 9 INVs PASS against classroom target 300 lux + U₀ 0.6 + UGR 19. 10-sample slice from the 99-point grid. Working plane 700 mm (student desk).

consumed_summary._layout_note: 16 panels in 4×4 grid: x ∈ {1250, 3750, 6250, 8750} × y ∈ {1000, 3000, 5000, 7000}. 3 entrance switches (SW01..SW03) for the multi-entrance classroom configuration. Zoned interior (Z2) + perimeter window-side (Z1).

ies_files._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, 4500lm, 4000K, opal diffuser. Distribution: Lambertian cos(theta) per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical opal panel. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Engineer must substitute project IES.

grid_metadata.grid_spacing_formula: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §6.2 adaptive: p = 0.2 × 5^log₁₀(d) clamped [50, 1000] mm; for d=9.0m task area: p ≈ 0.2 × 5^0.954 × 1000 ≈ 929 mm → snapped to nominal 900 mm. Grid fitted to task area: 11 cols × 9 rows = 99 points (x-step 900, y-step 875 to fit 7000mm y-extent exactly).

reflectances._source: CIBSE LG7 §6.2 clean classroom reflectances (0.7/0.5/0.2) — matches lighting-layout assumptions.

rationale.chat_summary: Cascade retrofit of lighting-layout uk-multi-entrance-classroom. 16 LED_PANEL_600 (4500 lm) in 4×4 grid produce achieved_avg 482 lux (61% margin over 300 classroom target); achieved_min 380 lux ≥ 210 (0.7×300); U₀ 0.79 ≥ 0.6 classroom target; max UGR 17.8 ≤ 19 classroom limit. All 9 INVs PASS. Verifies the BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 classroom row (300/0.6/19) — distinct from open_plan_office row (500/0.6/19).

sections.title: Cascade context
sections.summary: Consumes electrical/lighting-layout/examples/uk-multi-entrance-classroom/intent-out.json — a classroom with multi-entrance configuration (3 switches per BS 7671 §559.5 each-entrance switching requirement). Lumen-method N=10.75 → 11 minimum; bumped to 16 for 4×4 grid symmetry + S/H margin. Photometric-analysis verifies the over-spec layout passes per-point + UGR with comfortable margin.

sections.title: Grid resolution derivation
sections.summary: Task area 9×7 m after 500mm border. d=9m; corrected §6.2 formula p ≈ 929 mm snapped to 900 mm per [grid-spacing-rules#adaptive-formula]. 11×9 = 99 grid points (x-step 900, y-step 875). Identical to cascade-office-open-plan (same room dimensions).

sections.title: Per-point illuminance — classroom target
sections.summary: achieved_avg 482 lux (108% of classroom 300 target — over-spec from the 11→16 grid-symmetry round-up; matches upstream lumen-method 446.4 within 8% — the small delta reflects the photometric engine's per-point integration vs the lumen-method's lumped UF). achieved_min 380 lux at NW corner (500, 7500); 170 lux margin over the 210 threshold. The classroom target is materially lower than the office target (300 vs 500); a properly-sized classroom is comfortably over-spec.

sections.title: UGR per CIE 117 — classroom limit
sections.summary: Max UGR 17.8 (auto_S_wall observer) ≤ 19 classroom limit per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 row 5.34 classroom (same UGR limit as open_plan_office). 1.2 margin. The lumen-method ugr_status='UGR ≤ 19 — confirm from photometric data (classroom task)' flag on upstream is now resolved with a hard photometric verification.

sections.title: Working plane = 700 mm (student desk)
sections.summary: room.working_plane_mm=700 reflects student desk height per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.x classroom; differs slightly from the 750 mm office working plane (adult desk). The 50 mm difference is small enough that it doesn't materially change the achieved values at the 2.8 m ceiling height (cosine fall-off is gentle in the central rays), but it's important for the standard's correct application.

sections.title: Multi-entrance switching context (informational)
sections.summary: 3 entrance switches per BS 7671 §559.5 require each entrance to have switching control of either the whole room or its local zone. The photometric calc treats the full output as the verification case — switching state is a controls overlay, not a compliance basis (matches reception-lobby cascade convention).

sections.title: Cascade signal
sections.summary: Intent payload sets task_area_compliant=true and non_compliance_flags=[]; lighting-layout INV-11 reads these and PASSes. uk-multi-entrance-classroom full_drawing IR is sign-off-ready for the photometric dimension.

sections.title: Honest disclosure
sections.summary: IES file verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — Lambertian archetype, NOT manufacturer-measured. Engineer-of-record substitutes project IES before final design freeze. Reflectances 0.7/0.5/0.2 assumed clean classroom (matches upstream assumption); real classrooms with dark furniture or chalk-board walls may have lower wall reflectance (0.3-0.4) reducing avg by ~5-8%.

invariants.evidence: Achieved min 380 lux ≥ 0.7 × target 300 = 210 lux per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 + §4.4. Cold point at NW corner (500, 7500); 170 lux margin over threshold (well-provisioned classroom).
Achieved U₀ = 380/482 = 0.788 ≥ 0.6 classroom target per [ugr-rules#per-room-type-limits]. 4×4 uniform grid produces smooth spatial distribution.

Max UGR 17.8 (auto_S_wall observer at (5000, 1500)) ≤ 19 classroom limit per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 row 5.34 classroom (same UGR limit as open_plan_office). 1.2 margin. Resolves upstream lighting-layout ugr_status flag.
1 distinct luminaire_type (LED_PANEL_600) in upstream consumed_summary; 1 ies_files[] entry matches; LM-63 parser returns total_lumens=4500 + max_intensity_cd=1390.

grid_spacing_mm=900 matches BS EN 12464-1 §6.2 formula output p ≈ 929 mm within ±50 mm tolerance. d=9.0m task area (same as cascade-office-open-plan and cascade-uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali — all share the 9×7 task area derived from 10×8 room).
illuminance_grid.length (full runtime emission) = point_count=99. 10-sample slice in this IR; every (x_mm, y_mm) inside task_area_bounds [500,9500]×[500,7500]. No duplicate coordinates.
4 ugr_results entries with _source=cie_117_default (N, S, E, W wall-facing per [ugr-rules#default-observer-positions]). No engineer overrides supplied.
ies_files[0]._source length=262 chars ≥ 40 minimum; verification_status=synthetic_reference_C3 in enum per [ies-provenance-rules#verification-status-enum].
